examples: I saw a rotting hulk on the beach.
I followed his big hulk into the house.
Neglect, dilapidation, storm and fire have gradually reduced it to a rusting hulk, like the rib-cage of a whale.
But the truth is that, in any version, the Hulk is a dull beast.
Goliath just stands there, a frozen, massive hulk of roiling conflict and sheer terror.
